concept: Caretaker / One Who Provides Generative Grounding
description: One who attends to the daily needs of others or a place, providing a foundation of care and support.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'pha' (generative, growing) and 'ku' (ground). The word's structure suggests 'one who provides a generative foundation,' framing caretaking as a vital, foundational act that allows others to flourish.
